# Supported widgets

<!-- GENERATED by tools/widget-support-doc.mjs. Do not edit — run `pnpm run codegen`. -->

**90 Flutter widgets** compile to React today. A widget not on this list is *refused* with
`BRG3001` rather than approximated — the compiler will not draw something it cannot draw faithfully.

Coverage against real applications is a different and more useful number: **56.8%** of every widget
instantiation across two real, unmodified Flutter apps (measured by `tests/corpus.test.ts`, not estimated).
A short list covers most real code because real code repeats itself.

## Rendered by the React generator

|   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ActionChip` | `Align` | `AnimatedAlign` | `AnimatedContainer` |
| `AnimatedOpacity` | `AnimatedPadding` | `AppBar` | `AspectRatio` |
| `Badge` | `BottomAppBar` | `BottomNavigationBar` | `BottomNavigationBarItem` |
| `Card` | `Center` | `Checkbox` | `Chip` |
| `ChoiceChip` | `CircleAvatar` | `CircularProgressIndicator` | `ClipRRect` |
| `ClipRect` | `ColoredBox` | `Column` | `ConstrainedBox` |
| `Container` | `DecoratedBox` | `DefaultTabController` | `Divider` |
| `Drawer` | `DrawerHeader` | `ElevatedButton` | `Expanded` |
| `ExpansionTile` | `FilledButton` | `FilterChip` | `Flex` |
| `Flexible` | `FloatingActionButton` | `Form` | `FractionallySizedBox` |
| `Gap` | `GridView` | `Icon` | `IconButton` |
| `Image` | `Ink` | `InputDecorator` | `IntrinsicHeight` |
| `IntrinsicWidth` | `LinearProgressIndicator` | `ListTile` | `ListView` |
| `Material` | `MaterialBanner` | `MaxGap` | `NavigationBar` |
| `NavigationDestination` | `NavigationDrawer` | `NavigationDrawerDestination` | `NavigationRail` |
| `NavigationRailDestination` | `Opacity` | `OutlinedButton` | `OverflowBox` |
| `Padding` | `PageView` | `Positioned` | `PreferredSize` |
| `Radio` | `RichText` | `Row` | `SafeArea` |
| `Scaffold` | `SelectableText` | `SingleChildScrollView` | `SizedBox` |
| `Slider` | `Spacer` | `Stack` | `Switch` |
| `Tab` | `TabBar` | `TabBarView` | `Text` |
| `TextButton` | `TextField` | `TextFormField` | `Tooltip` |
| `VerticalDivider` | `Wrap` |  |  |

## Recognised by the analyzer, not yet rendered

These have catalog metadata — extraction understands their structure, slots and children — but the React
generator has no mapping, so a program using one is refused rather than approximated.

|   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `AnimatedSwitcher` | `Baseline` | `ButtonBar` | `ButtonSegment` |
| `CupertinoApp` | `CustomScrollView` | `DataTable` | `Dismissible` |
| `FadeInImage` | `FittedBox` | `FormField` | `FutureBuilder` |
| `GestureDetector` | `Hero` | `InkWell` | `ListBody` |
| `ListenableBuilder` | `MaterialApp` | `MergeSemantics` | `MultiSliver` |
| `OverflowBar` | `PopScope` | `ReorderableListView` | `RepaintBoundary` |
| `SegmentedButton` | `Semantics` | `SliverAppBar` | `SliverGap` |
| `SliverList` | `SnackBar` | `StreamBuilder` | `Table` |
| `ToggleButtons` | `Transform` | `WidgetsApp` |  |

## What "supported" does not mean

- **Not every parameter.** A widget can be supported while a particular parameter is not; that is
  `BRG3017`, and the message names the parameter.
- **Not every colour.** A widget that paints a Material role needs the program's theme to define a token
  for it (INV-20). `ColorScheme.fromSeed(…)` derives all 46; literal theme colours generally do not, and
  the refusal is `BRG3010`.
- **Not layout equivalence.** Supported means it renders with the semantics the runtime kit implements. The
  authoritative visual comparison (ADR-12) is not part of this release.

## Unsupported Flutter features

Whole areas, rather than individual widgets. Each is refused with a diagnostic that names the missing
capability and the layer that owns it — never a generic failure, and never a suggestion that your Flutter
code is at fault.

| Area | Diagnostic | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Imperative navigation — `Navigator.push` / `pushNamed` / `pushReplacement` | `BRG3013`, `BRG3008` | [ADR-0025](../adr/0025-the-navigation-model.md) D2 names the construct (`logic.Navigate`). Proposed, not implemented |
| `Navigator.pop` / `popUntil` / `maybePop` | `BRG3013` | same construct. A pop is *not* a route transition (Spec v2.4 §A17.3), so it carries no edge |
| Route overlays — `showDialog`, `showModalBottomSheet`, `showMenu` | `BRG3013` | the same blocker: an overlay pushes a `Route`, so it is a navigation to an inline destination |
| Messenger overlays — `showSnackBar`, `ScaffoldMessenger` | `BRG3013` | a *different* blocker — a snack bar is enqueued, not routed. No ADR models it yet |
| Route constructor arguments — `home: Screen(id: …)` | `BRG3018` | the analyzer extracts them; `app.Route` has no field linking a route to them ([ADR-0025](../adr/0025-the-navigation-model.md) D1) |
| Routes computed at runtime — `onGenerateRoute` | `BRG1304` | the route table is not read from a function; the routes it builds are invisible to N11 |
| Gestures beyond taps | `BRG3013` | not modelled |
| Slivers | `BRG3013` | refused, never emulated |
| Custom painting (`CustomPaint`, `Canvas`) | `BRG3013` | not modelled |
| Explicit animation (`AnimationController`) | `BRG3013` | not modelled; implicit animations are supported |
| Platform channels, plugins with native code | — | out of scope |
| `FutureBuilder`/`StreamBuilder` | `BRG3007` | rendering a future needs loading and error branches, and inventing either is what a generator must not do |
| User-defined classes as values | `BRG3002` | no class emission yet |

Navigation is the largest of these, and what it costs a real application is measured rather than guessed —
see the [navigation model validation](../m6/m6d-navigation-model-validation.md), which counts every
navigation construct across 80 476 lines of two production Flutter apps.

See [troubleshooting](../troubleshooting.md) for what each diagnostic means and what to do about it.
